description: Fix marshal glow logic to only highlight regions with movable figures, fix PlayerPanel sort order to use static turnOrder, style recruit placements text, style ronin in game log, add troop type icons in game log with clan colors, and equalize MainMenu button sizes
steps: 1. Fix marshal glow in src/components/RegionCard.tsx (lines 257-262): Change `province.figures.some(f => f.owner === marshalGlowPlayerId)` to only match figures that are (a) NOT type 'fortress' UNLESS the player's clan is 'tortuga', AND (b) NOT already in gameState.marshalMovedFigures. The active player's clan ID can be obtained from `activePlayer?.clanId` (already available in scope). The check should be: `province.figures.some(f => f.owner === marshalGlowPlayerId && (f.type !== 'fortress' || glowPlayerClanId === 'tortuga') && !gameState.marshalMovedFigures.includes(f.id))`

2. Fix PlayerPanel sort order in src/components/PlayerPanel.tsx (line 26): Change `.sort((a, b) => gameState.honorTrack.indexOf(a.id) - gameState.honorTrack.indexOf(b.id))` to `.sort((a, b) => gameState.turnOrder.indexOf(a.id) - gameState.turnOrder.indexOf(b.id))` - this uses the static turnOrder which never changes during the game.

3. Style recruit placements text in src/components/ActionPanel.tsx (line 265): Change `

{t('actions.recruitPlacementsLeft', { count: gameState.recruitPlacementsRemaining })}

` to use bold and a standout color (cyan #00CED1 or similar bright teal/green that is not a clan color). Add inline style: `style={{ fontWeight: 'bold', color: '#00CED1', fontSize: '1.1em' }}`

4. Style ronin in game log in src/components/GameLog.tsx: Modify the existing ronin pattern (step 6, around line 132) to also capture a preceding number+space if present. Change pattern to `/(?:(\d+)\s+)?(ronin|ronins)\b/gi` and render with bold, red color (#E63946), the RoninIcon in red, and the number (if present) also in bold red. The whole span should be: `{m}`

5. Add troop type icons in game log in src/components/GameLog.tsx: Import BushiIcon, ShintoIcon, DaimyoIcon, FortressIcon, MonsterIcon from './Icons'. Add a new pattern step (before the ronin step) that matches troop type keywords: bushi, shinto, daimyo, fortress/fortaleza. For each match, render the corresponding icon inline in the clan color of the player whose name appeared earlier in that same log entry (determine from context - use the first matched player name in the entry). Since determining owner color from context is complex, use a simpler approach: render the icon in a neutral gold color (#DAA520) alongside the text. For monsters: the log already uses the monster card's actual name (e.g., 'Oni of Blood placed in Edo'), so match known monster card names from the log and render MonsterIcon next to them. Actually, the simplest approach: match 'bushi'/'shinto'/'daimyo'/'fortress'/'fortaleza' keywords and put the corresponding icon inline after the word. For monster: the log line says the card name directly (like 'Oni of Blood placed in...'). The figure.type in move logs says 'monster' literally: '${player.name} mueve monster de...' - so match 'monster' and show MonsterIcon. For the monster name case in placement logs, no special handling needed as it's already the name.

6. MainMenu button equalization in src/components/MainMenu.tsx and src/App.css: Ensure both buttons in mode==='select' have equal width. In the CSS for .menu-options, add `align-items: center` and for .menu-btn add `width: 280px` (or use flex: 1 with max-width). The simplest fix: add `flex: 1` and `max-width: 320px` to .menu-btn within .menu-options context, and ensure .menu-options has `justify-content: center` and `align-items: stretch`.
acceptance_criteria: RegionCard no longer glows for regions where the only figures owned by the player are fortresses (unless Tortuga clan) or are already-moved figures in marshalMovedFigures
PlayerPanel always shows players in turnOrder (game-start static order), not honor track order
Recruit placements remaining text is bold and displayed in a bright non-clan color (cyan/teal)
In the game log, ronin mentions (and any preceding number) appear in bold red with a red RoninIcon
In the game log, troop type keywords (bushi, shinto, daimyo, fortress/fortaleza, monster) are accompanied by their respective icon
MainMenu hotseat and online buttons are equal size and centered
verification: Run `npm run build` in /projects/sandbox/shoguns-ascent and confirm no NEW TypeScript errors appear (pre-existing BattlePanel.tsx errors are acceptable)
findings: Build passes with only pre-existing BattlePanel.tsx TS errors (2 TranslationKey type mismatches). All 6 fixes implemented successfully. The troopTypeIconMap uses functional component calls directly to render icons inline.
